meaning: n.混乱状态v.处于混乱状态
examples: This view has caused great controversy: Black Americans have fallen into a "tangle of pathology".
Bologna has prompted a mass tidying-up of the tangle of different degrees awarded in different European countries.
Barely five minutes later, we screeched to a halt next to a tangle of vine, branches and bush.
The condition involves a kind of tangle in the brain called an arteriovenous malformation, or AVM.
